title: Living Alone Diaries | An introvert's self care day of not leaving the house and eating all day!

questions.question: What does 'cushion foundation' refer to in this video?
options: A) A type of face mask
B) A liquid makeup product in a compact case
questions.explanation: Cushion foundation是一种气垫粉底，是一种液态粉底液浸在海绵垫中的化妆品包装，需要用粉扑按压取妆。视频中提到的Clio cushion foundation就是这类产品。

questions.question: What does the speaker mean by 'glowy and dewy' when describing her skin?
questions.explanation: 'Glowy and dewy'是形容皮肤看起来有光泽、滋润、有水分的状态，通常是使用了高光或保湿产品后的效果。这是美妆中常见的描述词汇。

questions.question: Why did the speaker cancel all her plans for the day?
options: B) She was waiting for a UPS pickup
C) She had a work deadline
D) She was in a bad mood
questions.explanation: 根据字幕，她说她'leave my house until that shipment gets picked up so I canceled all my plans today'，意思是她要等UPS来取货，所以不能出门。

questions.question: What is 'PCOS' mentioned in the video?
options: B) A hormonal disorder affecting women
C) A type of makeup product
questions.explanation: PCOS是多囊卵巢综合征(Polycystic Ovary Syndrome)的缩写，是一种影响女性的激素失衡疾病。视频中博主提到因为PCOS导致腋下出现激素失衡问题。

questions.question: What product is 'Dior Blooming Bouquet' according to the video?
questions.explanation: 视频中提到'This is the Dior Blooming Bouquet It just smells so feminine so beautiful'，说明Dior Blooming Bouquet是一款香水。

questions.question: What type of highlighter does the speaker prefer according to the video?
questions.explanation: 视频中她说'i'm a huge fan of very shimmery highlighters'，表明她非常喜欢带有很多闪片的高光产品。

questions.question: What is the speaker waiting for at the beginning of the video?
questions.explanation: 根据字幕，她提到'i'm actually waiting for the UPS driver to come and pick up a million boxes'，说明她在等UPS司机来取包裹。

questions.question: What does the speaker mean by 'solo date' in the video?
options: A) A date with a stranger
B) Spending time alone by herself
C) A video call with fans
questions.explanation: 'Solo date'指的是与自己单独约会，即独自一人度过放松的时光。视频中她说'i'm supposed to have a little solo date today with myself'。

questions.question: Which jewelry brand collaborated with Helzburg Diamonds?
questions.explanation: 视频中提到'Helzberg Diamonds teamed out with Aurate New York And together they created a new beautiful collection'，说明Aurate New York与Helzburg Diamonds合作。

questions.question: What is the speaker's mood at the beginning of the video?
options: B) Feeling chatty and wants to talk
questions.explanation: 视频中她说'I was feeling very chatty So I wanted to do like an old school YouTube style sit down talk about favorite products'，表明她当时心情很好，想和大家聊天。

questions.question: What does it mean when the speaker says 'putting things on the back burner'?
questions.explanation: 'Put on the back burner'是一个习语，意思是把某件事情暂时搁置或推迟处理。视频中博主说'i have a habit of putting a lot of things on the back burner'。

questions.question: What is the main topic of this YouTube video?
options: B) A day at home doing self-care
questions.explanation: 视频标题是'Living Alone Diaries | An introvert's self care day of not leaving the house and eating all day!'，主要内容是一个内向者的居家自我护理日。

questions.question: What color is the Chanel lipstick mentioned in the video?
questions.explanation: 视频中提到'This is the Chanel 798 A very beautiful like rozy color'，说明是玫瑰粉色。

questions.question: What does 'exposed shoulder' mean in the context of the video?
options: B) Showing skin on the shoulder area
questions.explanation: 'Exposed shoulder'指的是露出肩膀。视频中她提到穿搭时露出肩膀的设计。

questions.question: What is the speaker's goal regarding time in the past few years?
options: B) To soak in and enjoy each moment
questions.explanation: 视频中她说'my goal is to really soak'，意思是她想好好享受和珍惜每一刻。根据上下文'soak in the moment'是沉浸其中的意思。

questions.question: What product does the speaker recommend for creating content?
questions.explanation: 视频中她说'for my content creators I love tripods This is the fun one'，推荐了用于拍摄的三脚架。

questions.question: Describe a day when you stay at home for self-care. What activities would you do?
questions.explanation: 这是一道口语表达题，要求描述一个居家自我护理日的经历和活动。
questions.referenceAnswer: 要点：1) 描述居家活动的具体内容 2) 说明为什么选择这些活动进行自我护理 3) 分享放松身心的感受
questions.hint: 你可以参考视频中博主的居家安排，如：化妆、试新产品、听音乐、休息等

questions.question: What is the speaker's opinion about the Clio cushion foundation?
options: A) It's not as good as drugstore products
B) It's better than many high-end cushion foundations
questions.explanation: 视频中她说'I think these are better than a lot of like high-end cushion foundations'，表示她认为Clio的气垫粉底比很多高端品牌的气垫粉底更好。

questions.question: What does the speaker say about the necklace she is wearing?
options: A) It's too formal for everyday wear
B) It's great for layering and everyday use
questions.explanation: 视频中她说'it's such a great layering piece...simple enough to just have it for everyday wear'，表示这是一条很适合日常佩戴的项链。

questions.question: What is your favorite beauty product and why? Explain what makes it special.
questions.explanation: 这是一道口语表达题，要求分享最喜欢的一款美妆产品及其特别之处。
questions.referenceAnswer: 要点：1) 介绍产品名称和类型 2) 说明产品的特点（如效果、质地、色号等） 3) 解释为什么喜欢这款产品
questions.hint: 可以参考视频中提到的产品类型，如粉底、腮红、高光、香水等

questions.question: What did the speaker lose because her microphone wasn't plugged in?
questions.explanation: 视频中她说'I did it again my mic was once again not plugged in And I lost all my...'，从上下文推断她丢失的是录制的声音/音频内容。

questions.question: What is the speaker planning to do with Blurry Salsa Man?
options: B) Book a flight to Korea
questions.explanation: 视频中她说'i'm also booking a flight to Korea again with Blurry Salsa Man'，表示她要和这个人一起预订去韩国的机票。

questions.question: If you were looking for a holiday gift for a beauty lover, what would you recommend and why?
questions.explanation: 这是一道口语表达题，要求为美妆爱好者推荐节日礼物。
questions.referenceAnswer: 要点：1) 推荐具体的产品类型 2) 解释礼物的适用性和受欢迎程度 3) 说明选择这个礼物的原因
questions.hint: 可以参考视频中提到的产品，如香水、化妆品、珠宝等作为礼物推荐

questions.question: What does 'a touch of diamond sparkle' describe in the video?
questions.explanation: 视频中她说'two-tone white and yellow 14 karat gold with a touch of diamond sparkle Next this is the Diamond...Necklace'，描述的是一条项链。

questions.question: What does the speaker say about the tripod filming angle?
options: A) It shows weird angles from too high up
B) It provides the best close-ups
C) It's only for professional use
D) It makes the video too dark
questions.explanation: 视频中她说'those like weird angles that are filmed from like so high up It's this tripod'，表示这种三脚架拍出的角度是从高处拍摄的。
